input.command:
# Test what the Relay quote API returns for a Solana swap
curl -s -X POST "https://api.relay.link/quote/v2" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "user": "0xd8dA6BF26964aF9D7eEd9e03E53415D37aA96045",
    "originChainId": 8453,
    "destinationChainId": 792703809,
    "originCurrency": "0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000",
    "destinationCurrency": "0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000",
    "amount": "1000000000000000",
    "tradeType": "EXACT_INPUT",
    "recipient": "7EcDhSYGxXyscszYEp35KHN8vvw3svAuLKTzXwCFLtV"
  }' 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(json.dumps(d, indent=2)[:500])"
input.description: Test Relay quote for cross-chain to Solana
